author: Stephany Deras
content: This is the most sickening money hungry app I have ever encountered in my life. HP you absolutely disgust me fully! HP has an embedded server that is not secure so that you will become infected on your computer with a trojan virus and they then offer you to remove the virus for a couple hundred dollars. I am a computer technician and did not need their services but how disgusting that they purposely infected my computer with their embedded web network where the settings of the printer live!!
